/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/zed_mono_checker.dir/src/board_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zed_mono_checker.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o zed_mono_checker  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/opencv/lib /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.13.0 /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.13.0 /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.13.0 /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.13.0 /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.13.0 /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.13.0 /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /opt/opencv/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0
